dis_application_view.llm_summary: Amina Danladi is a NG national applying for Skilled Worker permission sponsored by Hoama (Staplehurst) Ltd for Management consultants and business analysts (SOC 2431). The application states salary £50,451 against the SOC going rate £50,200 and start date 2026-07-01. DIS routes the case to manual review because salary borderline above current threshold; minor name spelling variant on non-passport documents. The officer should inspect the linked evidence and use the RFI flow where further evidence is needed.
